absorption: CVD divergence aktif (7040 pozitif) + fiyat VAH-VAL banda dusus + 5 bar delta sum negatif (-89) = kurumsal ask absorption mevcut, satis baskilari gizli
dom_observation: bid_ask_ratio 0.54 = ask agir, satis baskisi artiyor, emir defterinde ask derinligi (77) bid derinliginin (42) 1.83x ustu
htf_alignment: 15m BEAR + 1h BEAR = 2/3 timeframe bearish, 5m bullish ancak HTF consensus bearish tarafinda
session_bias: Session delta -8215 (guclu satis), buy_sell_ratio 0.93 < 1.0 = satis dominansi gunun basinda kurulmus, fiyat henuz VAH-VAL bandasi icinde
reasoning: CVD divergence + DOM ask agir + session sell dominant + HTF bearish + delta negatif absorption = kurumsal short setup, VAL'ye donus bekle
